futureLaneSignals.claimText: Navigation references multiple residency programs (IM, Nurse, Pharmacy) at Sarasota Memorial.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Navigation links to residency programs (Internal Medicine, Nurse, Pharmacy) — GME content, Tier 2.
futureLaneSignals.limitations: Navigation-only reference; no program details on this page.

recommendedA2Focus: Check Clinical Trials, Researchers, and Publications subpages for any medical-student research elective signal.
Inspect IM Residency Program page to assess Tier 2 IMG-friendliness and any visiting-student/USCE pathway.
unresolveds: Page describes clinical research operations and >160 active clinical trials for patients; no explicit statement about medical-student research electives, observerships, or visiting-student access.

claims.quote: Residency TrainingRN Residency ProgramInternal Medicine Residency ProgramEmergency Medicine Residency ProgramPharmacy Residency Program
claims.claimText: Sarasota Memorial advertises Internal Medicine, Emergency Medicine, RN, and Pharmacy residency programs on its careers portal.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Lists residency training programs (Internal Medicine, Emergency Medicine, Pharmacy) which are GME training — Tier 2.
claims.limitations: Careers portal index only; no eligibility, application route, or IMG/visa policy stated here.

claims.quote: Additional ProgramsClinical Pastoral Education (CPE) ProgramAdministrative Fellowship Program
claims.claimText: Sarasota Memorial lists an Administrative Fellowship Program and a Clinical Pastoral Education (CPE) Program under additional training programs.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Administrative fellowship + CPE are post-degree training programs — Tier 2 trainee lane.
claims.limitations: No physician clinical fellowship mentioned; administrative fellowship is non-clinical leadership track.

claims.quote: Join Our Team!Careers at Sarasota Memorial Health Care SystemOne of the largest public health systems in Florida, Sarasota Memorial Health Care System is a full-service public health system
claims.claimText: Sarasota Memorial Health Care System operates a public careers portal for the health system.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Top-level careers portal landing page covering hospital-wide employment — Tier 3 practice/career.
claims.limitations: No physician-specific or visa-sponsorship language stated on this page.

claims.quote: Experienced Registered Nurses:Join our SMH Venice Team NOW!
claims.claimText: Recruiting callout for experienced Registered Nurses at the SMH Venice campus.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Experienced-RN recruiting callout — Tier 3 post-training employment, not USCE.
claims.limitations: Nursing recruitment; not within physician USCE scope but logged as future-lane signal.

recommendedA2Focus: Look for dedicated SMH observership / visiting student / medical education pages outside the careers portal
Check Internal Medicine and Emergency Medicine residency program pages for IMG/visa/ECFMG policy
Investigate any FSU College of Medicine or LECOM affiliation pages for visiting students at Sarasota Memorial
Check the Administrative Fellowship page for application route and audience
unresolveds: No USCE/observership/visiting-student signal on this careers page; downstream A2 should check institution-specific GME/medical-education subdomain
